basic_details.job_title: IIT Kharagpur Registrar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 57 years Age relaxation will be as per the rules and regulations of the Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with at least 55% marks in aggregate from recognized and reputed universities in India/overseas or its equivalent grade of 'B' in the UGC 7-point scale and consistently good academic record, At least 15 years of experience in an institution of higher education of repute as Assistant Professor in Level 11 of Pay Matrix Rs.68900-117200/- and above along with experience in educational administration or with 8 years of service in Level 12 of Pay Matrix Rs.101500-167400/- and above including as Associate Professor along with experience in educational administration in an institution of repute, Comparable experience in research establishment and / or other institutions of repute, 15 years of administrative experience, of which 8 years shall be as Deputy Registrar in Level 12 of Pay Matrix Rs.78800-209200/- and above or an equivalent post in an institution of higher education of repute, Qualification in area of Management /Engineering / Law, Experience in handling computerized administration, legal, financial or establishment matters
qualification.details: Master's degree with at least 55% marks in aggregate from recognized and reputed universities in India/overseas or its equivalent grade of 'B' in the UGC 7-point scale and consistently good academic record. At least 15 years of experience in an institution of higher education of repute as Assistant Professor in Level 11 of Pay Matrix Rs.68900-117200/- and above along with experience in educational administration or with 8 years of service in Level 12 of Pay Matrix Rs.101500-167400/- and above including as Associate Professor along with experience in educational administration in an institution of repute; or Comparable experience in research establishment and / or other institutions of repute; or 15 years of administrative experience, of which 8 years shall be as Deputy Registrar in Level 12 of Pay Matrix Rs.78800-209200/- and above or an equivalent post in an institution of higher education of repute. Desirable: Qualification in area of Management /Engineering / Law. Experience in handling computerized administration, legal, financial or establishment matters.

salary_details.details: The selected candidate will receive a salary in Level 14 of the Pay Matrix, ranging from Rs. 144200 to Rs. 218200 per month.

selection_process: Screening Test Seminar Presentation Group Discussion Personal Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kharagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kharagpur Registrar recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Kharagpur Registrar position is 30th June 2026. It is advisable to complete the application process well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Registrar post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with at least 55% marks from a recognized university. Additionally, significant experience in higher education institutions or administrative roles is mandatory, as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Registrar position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Registrar post is 57 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per the recruitment rules of IIT Kharagpur.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Registrar role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Registrar position will be placed in Level 14 of the Pay Matrix, with a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 144200 to Rs. 218200.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Registrar post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Registrar at the Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the IIT Kharagpur Registrar recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. General and OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 1000, while SC, ST, and Women candidates are required to pay Rs. 500.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Registrar position?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves multiple stages, including a Screening Test, Seminar Presentation, Group Discussion, Personal Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual or permanent position?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is listed as Contractual. Please refer to the official notification for more details on the contract duration and terms.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading. It is highly recommended to read this document thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the IIT Kharagpur Registrar recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIT Kharagpur or via the direct 'Apply Online' link provided in the 'Important Links' section before the last date of 30th June 2026.
